title: Tentaquil [Cobblemon]
description: A datapack that adds the custom pokémon "Tentaquil" to Cobblemon!
body:
# Tentaquil ### ![logo](https://i.imgur.com/5Hqc42Q.png) For [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)! ![logo](https://i.imgur.com/5Hqc42Q.png) ![tentaquil image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yqorxY4u/images/a9e436eb782bc4eec2856d0c88d4dffb8c00beaf.png) This resource pack adds two custom pokémon to the game; ***Tentaquil*** and it's pre-evo ***Pitipole***! ### Overview Tentaquil and its pre-evo, Pitipole, will rarely spawn in watery areas of lush caves biomes. Pitipole is much more common than Tentaquil, and may evolve if exposed to a fruit from its native environment... though there may be another method! ### Stats #### Pitipole ![Pitipole Image](https://i.imgur.com/8QahjGe.png)
`HP:` 30
`ATK:` 20
`DEF:` 20
`SP. ATK:` 25
`SP. DEF:` 20
`SPD:` 35
#### Tentaquil ![Tentaquil Image](https://i.imgur.com/WxqwCnT.png)
`HP:` 125
`ATK:` 105
`DEF:` 95
`SP. ATK:` 120
`SP. DEF:` 85
`SPD:` 70
## Installation ***Method 1:*** Put `Tentaquil_Assets_vX.X` in your resourcepacks folder and `Tentaquil_Datapack_vX.X` in your world's datapacks folder. ***Method 2:*** Put `Tentaquil_vX.X` in both your resourcepacks folder and your save's datapacks folder. --- ***NOTE:*** You must enable the Tentaquil pack in your resourcepacks folder to get custom pokémon to properly display. ***FOR SERVERS:*** Servers only need `Tentaquil_Datapack_vX.X`, but all players will still need `Tentaquil_Assets_vX.X` in their resourcepacks folder for it to display properly.
